items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi raises to Buy
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB), a global lithium producer, from High Risk to Buy. The target price remains at $225. Citi adjusted its estimates to reflect the lithium market outlook and price assumptions ahead of the 2026 fiscal second-quarter earnings

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: 11:54 AM EDT, 05/26/2026 (MT Newswires) -- Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said in a Monday researc
